message:
test: add inline agent_mail tests and fix property tests

- Add Debug derive to AgentMailClient and impl for McpClient
- Add 40+ inline unit tests for agent_mail module covering:
  - InboxMessage serialization/deserialization
  - unwrap_tool_result parsing
  - JSON-RPC structures
  - from_config validation
- Re-enable determinism_tests and safety_tests modules
- Fix safety_tests to compile with current API

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
